disasterInfo.title: Fire
disasterInfo.description: Fires spread quickly and produce dangerous heat and smoke that can cause injury or death.
disasterInfo.message: Fire detected nearby. Evacuate immediately and avoid smoke.
instructions: Evacuate the building immediately using the nearest safe exit
Stay low to avoid inhaling smoke
Do not use elevators during a fire
Call emergency services once you are in a safe location

disasterInfo.title: Earthquake
disasterInfo.description: Sudden ground shaking caused by tectonic plate movement that can damage buildings and infrastructure.
disasterInfo.message: Earthquake occurring. Drop, cover, and hold on.
instructions: Drop to the ground immediately
Take cover under sturdy furniture
Hold on until the shaking stops
Move to an open area away from buildings afterward

disasterInfo.title: Flood
disasterInfo.description: Overflowing water that can submerge land, homes, and roads.
disasterInfo.message: Heavy rain expected. Move to higher ground.
instructions: Move to higher ground immediately
Avoid walking or driving through floodwater
Turn off electrical mains if it is safe to do so
Prepare emergency supplies and monitor updates

disasterInfo.title: Typhoon
disasterInfo.description: A powerful tropical storm that brings strong winds, heavy rainfall, and possible flooding.
disasterInfo.message: Typhoon approaching. Stay indoors and secure your surroundings.
instructions: Stay indoors and away from windows
Secure loose outdoor items
Prepare emergency supplies and charge devices
Follow official weather updates and evacuation orders

disasterInfo.title: Wildfire
disasterInfo.description: Large uncontrolled fires that spread rapidly through forests, grasslands, or rural areas.
disasterInfo.message: Wildfire nearby. Prepare to evacuate immediately.
instructions: Follow evacuation instructions from authorities
Cover nose and mouth to reduce smoke inhalation
Close all windows and doors before leaving
Move to designated evacuation shelters

disasterInfo.title: Power Outage
disasterInfo.description: Loss of electricity due to infrastructure failure, severe weather, or technical issues.
disasterInfo.message: Power outage reported. Use emergency lighting and conserve battery power.
instructions: Use flashlights instead of candles
Keep mobile phones charged and conserve battery
Avoid opening refrigerators frequently
Listen to official updates for restoration information

disasterInfo.title: Haze
disasterInfo.description: Air pollution caused by smoke particles that reduce air quality and visibility.
disasterInfo.message: Air quality is unhealthy due to haze. Limit outdoor activities.
instructions: Wear a protective mask when outdoors
Stay indoors as much as possible
Use air purifiers if available
Monitor official air quality updates
